acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/completion.sh accepts completion evidence[] entries that are existing repo-relative paths or HTTP(S) URLs.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validate_completion_evidence_paths allows HTTP(S) entries and checks repo-relative evidence paths for existence. just qd-reports-check passes with existing report URLs and repo-relative evidence paths.
The absolute-path temporary-copy negative smoke records the expected repo-relative path rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/completion.sh rejects evidence[] paths containing .. traversal.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The traversal temporary-copy negative smoke records the expected '..' traversal rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/completion.sh rejects missing repo-relative evidence[] paths.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The missing-path temporary-copy negative smoke records the expected missing evidence path rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing qd completion reports pass without weakening the contract.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: just qd-reports-check passes under the stricter evidence[] path contract.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and temporary-copy negative smokes for absolute, traversal, and missing evidence paths.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The node evidence directory contains all required positive and negative Linux validation logs.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The completion report marks real-world validation as not required and makes no macOS-specific validation claim.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; Linux command evidence is recorded and no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
